title: ficaria fertilis
intro: Ficaria fertilis, also known as lesser celandine, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buttercup family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of lesser celandine include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help to prevent the onset of certain types of cancer. Lesser celandine can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
